$comment: Canon Knowledge Production V1 — foundational domains. STATE: production IN PROGRESS (Sprint 2A + 2B + 2C). The canonical source หลักมหาภูต (ส. หยกฟ้า) is available as OCR; D-067 added the book's Named Positions; D-068 added the optional `context` applicability qualifier so chart-scoped facts are representable faithfully. Units are produced FROM the source pages (reference-only provenance, D-057) — never invented (D-066: extraction allowed, generation forbidden) — and validated through the real platform by test/validation/thai/thai_canon_production_sprint2_test.dart. CONVENTION: a unit WITHOUT context is a general/unconditional fact (e.g. natural significations jupiter→learning/career, moon→finance, recurring identically across charts); a unit WITH context {type, value} is true ONLY within that scope (here archetype_chart:<verbatim Thai chart heading from the page>). The context value is the source's own chart name (verbatim, not translated) so no inference/external knowledge is introduced.

source.title: หลักมหาภูต (ส. หยกฟ้า)

provenancePolicy: reference-only (D-057): store Book, Edition, Page, Section, Reviewer, Extraction Date. Never store copyrighted paragraphs or prose.

producedUnits.$note: Sprint 2B — general natural signification (ดาวจันทร์อันเป็นดาวแห่งการเงิน); recurs identically across charts (p47, p83, p222).
producedUnits.subject: planet.moon

producedUnits.$note: Sprint 2C — chart-scoped placement (D-068 context). ดวงนักวิชาการ p.220: ดาวพฤหัส...สถิตเรือนธงชัย...เข้มแข็ง.
producedUnits.subject: planet.jupiter
